name: fuel-calc
description: Fuel calculator web app packaged with Capacitor iOS

scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build:sim: xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build
scripts.ios:archive: xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -allowProvisioningUpdates archive -archivePath build/Fuel.xcarchive
